message:
enhance spawn_agent to support plugin-defined agent types

When spawn_agent is called with an agent_type parameter, look up the
agent in pluginAgents and apply its system prompt, model override, and
tool restrictions to the subagent session.

- Add Restrict method to ToolRegistry (always keeps communicate)
- Add agent_type parameter to defSpawnAgent() tool definition
- Pass agentType through the spawn_agent executor in session.go
- Apply plugin agent config in spawnAgent: model override, system prompt
  via UserInstructionOverride, and tool restriction via Restrict

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
